reason: Taxi Driver channels raw fury into a seething urban rebellion.
Braveheart’s epic revolt roars with uncompromising defiance and honor.
Natural Born Killers unleashes anarchic rage against a violent world.
Patton’s blistering rhetoric and war drive deliver patriotic ferocity.
Dead Man Walking confronts injustice with righteous, unyielding moral fire.
Pulp Fiction’s fearless dialogue and twisted morality spark white-hot revolt.
Glengarry Glen Ross’s predatory salesmen erupt in furious, no-excuses combat.
12 Angry Men crescendos into a powerful stand against complacent judgment.
Full Metal Jacket melds military discipline and urban rage into relentless tension.
Brazil’s dystopic absurdity rebels against suffocating bureaucratic control.
